topStories.title: Are US and Israel in lockstep in Iran war? Deciphering Trump's post after gas field attacks
topStories.description: What does Trump's Truth Social post after gas field attacks tell us about US-Israeli alignment?

topStories.title: Child among survivors pulled from rubble of US-Israeli attack in Iran
topStories.description: Video from Iran’s Red Crescent showed a child among survivors pulled from the wreckage of a US-Israeli air attack.

topStories.title: Chad warns Sudan it will retaliate after drone strike on mourners kills 17
topStories.description: President Idris Mahamat Déby orders the military to be on high alert and a "total closure" of the border.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Pilots' body urges flight crews to stay vigilant in West Asia air spaces, flags ‘increased risk’
dailyNews.description: The association recommended that pilots thoroughly evaluate all mission briefings, NOTAMS, and internal corporate guidelines before departure.

dailyNews.title: 80 Years After Hiroshima Horror, Japan Drawn Into Iran Nuke Crisis By Trump
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has repeatedly pressed allies, including Japan, to step in as tensions escalate in the Middle East. With European partners reluctant, Washington is now pushing Tokyo to play...

dailyNews.title: CISA urges companies to secure Microsoft Intune systems after hackers mass-wipe Stryker devices
dailyNews.description: The U.S. cybersecurity agency urged companies to prevent access to systems used for remotely managing their fleets of employee devices after hackers broke into a major U.S. medical tech giant and remotely wiped thousands of phones and computers.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s DHS pick Markwayne Mullin moves closer to confirmation after 8-7 Senate panel vote
dailyNews.description: During his confirmation hearing, Mullin faced criticism over past remarks and immigration policies but signaled a softer stance than former DHS chief Kristi Noem, including requiring warrants for home entries.

dailyNews.title: Chhattisgarh passes Freedom of Religion Bill 2026, introduces life imprisonment for mass conversions
dailyNews.description: During the discussion on the bill, Sharma, who also holds Home portfolio, accused the Congress of indulging in vote bank politics.

dailyNews.title: 'No Definitive Timeframe To End Iran War': Pentagon Chief
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth also addressed a report that the Pentagon has requested more than $200 billion in additional funding from Congress to pay for the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Relief For Elvish Yadav In Snake Venom Case As Supreme Court Sets Aside FIR
dailyNews.description: Elvish Yadav was arrested on March 17, 2024, in connection with allegations of using snake venom at a rave party in Noida.

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: BJP using ECI as weapon to win Bengal polls, says Kejriwal, supporting Mamata
dailyNews.description: Continuing with her tirade against the Election Commission, the Trinamool Congress supremo claimed that such action amounted to "systematic politicisation of institutions" and a "direct assault on the Constitution"

dailyNews.title: Arc expands into electric commercial and defense boats with $50M raise
dailyNews.description: The Los Angeles startup raised $50 million from Eclipse, a16z, Menlo Ventures, and others as it seeks to expand beyond sport boats.

dailyNews.title: The US–Israel war with Iran will not end with a clear victor
dailyNews.description: An arrangement that allows each side to claim it achieved its core goals is the most likely path out.

dailyNews.title: Iran to face biggest strikes today: Trump aide says US to end Gulf war on its terms

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict impact goes beyond oil; European firms are paying through nose for chips — here's why
dailyNews.description: The Middle East conflict has disrupted air freight routes, cutting capacity and raising costs for semiconductor shipments from Asia to Europe. Companies are paying more or using inventories, while airlines carry less cargo due to longer routes and extra fuel needs.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon seeks at least $200B from Congress for Iran war
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon is preparing a funding request for roughly $200 billion to sustain Iran war operations, replenish depleted munitions and support continued military action.

dailyNews.title: Vikings sign Carson Wentz to 1-year deal as they continue to add veteran depth around JJ McCarthy
dailyNews.description: Carson Wentz returned to the Minnesota Vikings on a one-year deal in a backup role, while Kyler Murray and J.J. McCarthy will compete for the starting job.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon targets Iran-linked militias in Iraq as Hegseth vows 'we will finish this' for fallen US troops
dailyNews.description: Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine said the U.S. is striking "Iranian-aligned militia groups" in Iraq, following the deaths of six soldiers.

dailyNews.title: Pence urges Senate to ‘restore public confidence’ with nationwide voter ID law
dailyNews.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence tells Fox News Digital that national voter ID "time has come" as Senate debates SAVE Act. Polls show vast majority support the measure.

dailyNews.title: House Democrats vote against deporting immigrants who harm police dogs, horses
dailyNews.description: House Democrats largely opposed a GOP bill targeting noncitizens who harm police dogs and horses, citing existing deportation laws and due process concerns.

dailyNews.title: Florida deputies mock rowdy spring breakers with NCAA-style scoreboard as arrests surge
dailyNews.description: Florida sheriff's office goes viral with hilarious posts targeting spring break students, creating NCAA tournament-style arrest leaderboard.

dailyNews.title: Costco debuts new sundae — but shoppers call it a 'slap in face'
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: NBA MVP candidate, 24, diagnosed with collapsed lung as playoffs near: report
dailyNews.description: The Detroit Pistons’ championship hopes took a hit as All-Star Cade Cunningham was diagnosed with a collapsed lung, leaving his status uncertain for the NBA playoffs.

topStories.description: Prosecutors have struggled to prove in court what the president and his aides have repeatedly said in public: that a network of leftist activists presents a serious threat to national security.

dailyNews.title: How Japan’s Leader Sanae Takaichi Found Her Voice in D.C. Decades Ago
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi got her start in politics as an intern for a trailblazing Colorado lawmaker. She returns to Washington this week to meet with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Friendship With Japan’s Leader Takaichi Faces Test Over Iran
dailyNews.description: In Washington on Thursday, President Trump is expected to press Sanae Takaichi for military help in the Strait of Hormuz. But she faces constraints on what she can offer.

dailyNews.title: The Markets Contend with Powell’s Long Goodbye at the Fed
dailyNews.description: The chair of the Federal Reserve said that he might not leave the central bank any time soon, setting up a potential clash with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says potential $200 billion Iran war spending request could shift: 'Takes money to kill bad guys'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director Kevin Hassett said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.

dailyNews.title: Trump's DHS pick Markwayne Mullin advances out of Senate committee after tough confirmation hearing
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump tapped Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., earlier this month to replace Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
dailyNews.description: Consumers are seeing fuel prices rapidly rise as the Iran war has triggered the biggest oil supply disruption in history.

dailyNews.title: Iran Targets Energy Sites After Israel Hit World's Largest Gas Field
dailyNews.description: Iran attacked oil and gas sites in Saudi Arabia, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait as the conflict rapidly becomes a war on the world’s energy supply. Iran says it is retaliation after Israel attacked the South Pars natural gas refinery on the Iranian coast which holds the largest gas reserves in the world. President Donald Trump says the United States was not involved in the original hit on the South Pars but is threatening to blow up the entirety of the gas field if Iran attacks Qat

dailyNews.title: Gabbard says Trump's objectives in Iran differ from the Israeli government
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard told Rep. Joaquin Castro, D-Texas, that President Trump's objectives in Iran differ from those of the Israeli government.

dailyNews.title: Some DHS contractors told White House officials they were asked to pay Corey Lewandowski
dailyNews.description: Some companies complained to the Trump administration that Lewandowski has stood to personally profit from the DHS contracting process. Lewandowski denies the allegations.

dailyNews.title: Japanese leader faces a 'very difficult' meeting with Trump as he presses for help with Iran
dailyNews.description: Few world leaders seem to get along with President Donald Trump as well as Sanae Takaichi.

dailyNews.title: Trump's DHS pick Mullin advances by one vote after Sen. Fetterman votes yes
dailyNews.description: Markwayne Mullin, President Trump’s nominee to lead the Department of Homeland Security, advanced through committee thanks to Sen. John Fetterman.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
